title: Bridge Essay: Partially Overlapping Neural Correlates of Metacognitive Monitoring and Metacogn

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Partially Overlapping Neural Correlates of Metacognitive Monitoring and Metacognitive Control.**. J Neurosci.. PMID: 35304428. DOI: 10.1523/JNEUROSCI.1326-21.2022. Metacognition describes the process of monitoring one'sown mental states, often for the purpose of cognitive control. Previous research has investigated how metacognitive signals are generated (metacognitive monitoring), for example, when people (both female/male) judge their confidence in their decisions and memories. Research has also investigated how metacognitive signals are used to influence behavior (metacognitive control), for example, setting areminder (i.e., cognitive offloading) for
